description: Multi-account IAM setup with cross-account roles and management VPC
review_checklist: Check cross-account trust policies for overly broad access
Verify MFA requirements on sensitive role assumptions
Check VPC flow logs for network monitoring
Verify S3 bucket versioning and backup configuration
Review security group rules for least privilege
Check encryption defaults for EBS volumes

ground_truth.description: Cross-account IAM role trust policy uses Principal '*' allowing any AWS account to assume the role
Cross-account assume role policy missing MFA condition for role 'dev-account-deploy-role'
VPC 'management-vpc' does not have VPC flow logs enabled for network traffic monitoring
S3 bucket 'terraform-state' does not have versioning enabled for state file protection
Security group allows SSH (port 22) ingress from 0.0.0.0/0
EBS encryption by default is explicitly disabled across the account
